ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant (M for male, F for female) */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the participant is competing in */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weight class of the participant */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used by the participant */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the participant represents */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the participant */,
  "coaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coaching staff assigned to the participant */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the participant in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the participant in kilograms */,
  "blood_group" TEXT /* Blood group of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_coaching_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("coaching_staff_id") REFERENCES coaching_staff ("coaching_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the division (e.g., 18-39, 40+) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight class */,
  "min_weight_kg" REAL /* Minimum weight in kilograms for the weight class */,
  "max_weight_kg" REAL /* Maximum weight in kilograms for the weight class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_staff" (
  "coaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coaching staff member */,
  "coaching_staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the coaching staff member */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the coaching staff member */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the coaching staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coaching_staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organizer of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., championship, cup, meet) */,
  "event_format" TEXT /* Format of the event (e.g., single-ply, multi-ply, raw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organizer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "best3_squat_kg" REAL /* Best three squat lifts in kilograms */,
  "best3_bench_kg" REAL /* Best three bench press lifts in kilograms */,
  "best3_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best three deadlift lifts in kilograms */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted in kilograms */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Final place in the event */,
  "dq_reason" TEXT /* Disqualification reason (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assigned role */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
